3240950.name: MAINCORE
3240950.description:
Dive into a relentless open-world survival experience packed with deep gameplay systems. Key Features Included Now:

  • Open-World Exploration: Roam a massive, persistent world filled with diverse environments, resources, and hidden dangers.

  • Building & Fortification: Construct customizable bases from scratch using gathered materials—walls, traps, storage, and defenses to protect your hard-earned progress.

  • Raiding: Break into player-built structures, steal resources, and claim territory in high-stakes sieges.

  • PvP Combat: Clash with other survivors in intense player-versus-player encounters—ambush, ally, or betray for dominance.

  • PvE Challenges: Battle hostile wildlife, environmental hazards, and AI-controlled enemies that patrol and attack.

  • Perspective Freedom: Switch instantly between immersive first-person view for precision aiming and third-person for better situational awareness.

Craft tools, weapons, and gear to survive hunger, weather, and threats. Every decision matters in this unforgiving sandbox where cooperation or conflict shapes your story. Early Access: Core systems are live and polished—join the fight today!
3240950.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
